title: saxifraga nelsoniana subsp. insularis
intro: Saxifraga nelsoniana subsp. insularis, also known as the Island Saxifrage, is a rare and endemic plant species found in the Azores Islands. It is a succulent perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and flowers, which are traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Saxifraga nelsoniana subsp. insularis can be infused in tea or made into a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
